_meta.source: Deities & Demigods + Krynn (Dragonlance) — Unified Master Database

qagwaaz.name: Qagwaaz
qagwaaz.personality: Fierce, silent, protects his people above all else.

hiawatha.name: Hiawatha
abilities: Peace-maker: can stop combat with CHA check
hiawatha.personality: Wise peacemaker. Seeks unity. Will fight only as absolute last resort.

stoneribs.name: Stoneribs
abilities: Stone skin: thrusting weapons do half damage
stoneribs.personality: Direct, powerful, fights like elemental force of nature.

arthur.name: King Arthur
abilities: Excalibur +5 sword of sharpness (lawful good only)
Magic scabbard: cutting/thrusting do half damage to Arthur
arthur.personality: Noble, absolutely principled. Will sacrifice himself before abandoning an ally.

galahad.name: Sir Galahad
abilities: Purity aura: +4 saves vs all evil magic
Immune to all diseases and poisons
galahad.personality: Absolutely pure. No moral compromise possible. Will shield any innocent.

lancelot.name: Sir Launcelot
abilities: Best mortal fighter: +2 vs named opponents
lancelot.personality: Tormented, magnificent. Will never break a sworn word.

gawaine.name: Sir Gawaine
abilities: Waxing STR: 9am-noon STR increases to 19, then to 21 (max)
gawaine.personality: Honorable but hot-tempered. Formidable at mid-morning.

tristram.name: Sir Tristram
tristram.personality: Romantic, tragic, fierce. Love and duty perpetually in conflict.

merlin.name: Merlin
abilities: Staff absorbs any spell cast at him; he re-casts it as his own
merlin.personality: Supremely powerful but haunted by future-visions. Acts obliquely, plans deeply.

morgan_le_fay.name: Morgan Le Fay
abilities: Poisoned dagger: save vs. poison or die
morgan_le_fay.personality: Scheming, brilliant, bitter. Uses beauty as a weapon. Hates Arthur.

lamorak.name: Sir Lamorak
abilities: Third greatest knight: +1 all combat rolls
lamorak.personality: Fierce and direct. Loyal to the point of stubbornness.

gareth.name: Sir Gareth
abilities: Beloved by common folk: peasants aid him freely
gareth.personality: Humble, genuinely kind. The most beloved of Arthur's knights.

palomides.name: Sir Palomides
abilities: Pursuit of the Questing Beast: immune to fear when on quest
Saracen techniques: +1 attack vs. armored opponents
palomides.personality: Earnest convert. Driven by honor and unrequited love. Seeks redemption.

pellinore.name: King Pellinore
abilities: Questing Beast tracker: finds any tracked creature
pellinore.personality: Singleminded. The hunt is everything. Loyal, simple, devastating.

gilgamesh.name: Gilgamesh
abilities: Fear of death: below 50% HP must check WIS or retreat
gilgamesh.personality: Mighty, tyrannical, secretly tender. Terrified of death since Enkidu died.

cuchulainn.name: Cu Chulainn
abilities: Gae Bolg +4 spear (4-40 dmg) - only he can wield it
Battle shining: mortal enemies -4 to attack
Warp spasm at near death: double damage attacks all
cuchulainn.personality: Blazing, joyful, doomed. Born to die young and gloriously. Never retreats.

heracles_hero.name: Heracles (Hero)
abilities: Nemean lion skin: thrusting 1pt slashing half bludgeoning full
Special bow: never misses at 1 mile, poisoned arrows vs magical foes
Berserker at <=50% HP: attacks all within reach +25 damage
heracles_hero.personality: He is the strongest man who ever lived, and he knows it, and the knowing has not made him kind or wise but has instead given him the particular sadness of someone who solved every problem with his hands and discovered too late that some things cannot be held. The gods used him for labors that would have broken anyone else, and he did them all, and each one cost him something the gods did not think to measure. He is the reason the word "herculean" exists, and if you asked him whether it was worth it, he would pick up something very heavy and change the subject.

perseus.name: Perseus
perseus.personality: Methodical hero. Plans carefully. Grateful to the gods who aid him.

odysseus.name: Odysseus
abilities: Tactical genius: +3 to surprise and ambush
Naval strategy: +4 to all naval actions
odysseus.personality: Cunning, patient, homesick. Never lies when truth is more useful. Often it is.

jason.name: Jason
abilities: Inspire loyalty: followers fight to death
jason.personality: Bold, charismatic leader. Glory-seeker who gets others killed for it.

theseus.name: Theseus
abilities: Knows all enemy weaknesses: +2 vs creatures studied
Bull wrestling: auto-pins bulls and bovine creatures
Labyrinth sense: never lost in enclosed spaces
Athenian law: +2 all social interactions in civilized areas
theseus.personality: Civic-minded hero. Genuinely wants to help the city. Romantically tragic.

bellerophon.name: Bellerophon
abilities: Aerial combat mastery: +3 vs grounded opponents when mounted
Spear accuracy: +2 to hit with spears from above
bellerophon.personality: Ambitious hero, victim of his own pride. Rides magnificently. Falls badly.

vainamoinen.name: Vainamoinen
abilities: Girdle of Cloud Giant Strength: STR 23
Songs alter reality: bardic magic affects all within 240ft
Crossbow of accuracy: never misses at 1 mile
vainamoinen.personality: Ancient, patient, sorrowful. Negotiates before fighting. Devastating when he acts.

ilmarinen.name: Ilmarinen
abilities: Forge mastery: creates magic items in 1 day
ilmarinen.personality: The craftsman. Values creation above destruction. Loyal and literal.

lemminkainen.name: Lemminkainen
abilities: Reckless combat: +2 attack -2 AC when charging
lemminkainen.personality: Reckless, charming, impulsive. Gets into trouble constantly. Usually escapes.

kullervo.name: Kullervo
abilities: Doomed to betray: 10% each turn acts against party interest
Cursed: any food he touches is poisoned
Destruction aura: structures crumble near him over time
kullervo.personality: Tragic, cursed, powerful. Not evil - simply broken. The doom is inside him.

elric.name: Elric of Melnibone
abilities: Stormbringer +5: each hit drains all levels (50%) or half HP (50%)
Each Stormbringer kill: +5 HP and +1 STR to Elric (max STR 23, 10 turns)
Ring of Kings: 70% summon any Elemental Lord
Sword sentient: 15%/battle Stormbringer acts against Elric
elric.personality: Tormented, brilliant, self-loathing. The sword will betray everyone eventually.

moonglum.name: Moonglum
abilities: Defensive fighting: +3 AC when not attacking
Loyal friend: +2 all rolls when Elric is threatened
moonglum.personality: Cheerful, steadfast, quietly remarkable. The only person Elric trusts.

fafhrd.name: Fafhrd
abilities: Defends friend: +2 all rolls when Mouser threatened
Snow/arctic survival: no penalties in cold
Bardic knowledge: knows legends of all cultures
fafhrd.personality: Huge, warm-hearted, storytelling. Will die for his friend. Acts on feeling first.

gray_mouser.name: Gray Mouser
abilities: Scalpel +1 short sword, Cat's Claw +1 dagger
Defends friend: +2 all rolls when Fafhrd threatened
Minor sorcery: knows 10 wizard spells 1st-4th level
gray_mouser.personality: Witty, cynical, agile. Thinks faster than he should. Loyal to exactly one person.

movarl.name: Movarl
abilities: Eastern prince authority: +2 social rolls in Eastern cities
movarl.personality: Honorable Eastern prince. Inflexible code. Will not compromise with evil.

raiko.name: Raiko
abilities: Bow: double normal range and damage
Demon slayer: +4 vs oni and demons
raiko.personality: Silent, swift, duty-bound. The hunt for demons is his purpose and peace.

yamamoto_date.name: Yamamoto Date
abilities: Dragon-slaying sword of sharpness: +6 vs dragons, decapitates on 17+
Bushido code: +2 all rolls when honor is at stake
yamamoto_date.personality: Pure bushido. Honor is absolute. Death before dishonor is not metaphor.

yoshmye.name: Yoshmye
abilities: Arrows pierce stone and metal (no hardness reduction)
Archery mastery: +3 to hit with bow
yoshmye.personality: Quiet hunter. Trusts Hachiman absolutely. Patient as stone.

hunapu.name: Hunapu & Xbalanque
abilities: Twin heroes: fight as one entity or separately
Ball game mastery: any athletic contest +4
hunapu.personality: They are twins who died and came back, which is the kind of thing that either makes you immortal or breaks you into something sharper than before, and in their case it did both. They played the ball game against the lords of death and won, which is not supposed to be possible, because death does not lose, except these two had been studying how not to lose since before they were born. They are the reason the maize grows and the stars stay in their courses, and they did it all with a blowgun and a smile that made the lords of Xibalba very nervous.

tanis_half_elven.name: Tanis Half-Elven
tanis_half_elven.title: The Reluctant Leader
abilities: Half-elven sight: infravision 60ft, surprised only on 1 in 10
Leadership under pressure: allies +1 saves when Tanis commands
Dragonlance proficiency: +3 to hit and damage vs. dragons
Cannot be magically compelled to betray allies
tanis_half_elven.personality: He is the man who does not know what he is — half of everything, whole of nothing, and somehow the center that holds. He has a beard because elves cannot grow them and he cannot stop being half-mortal, and every time he looks in a mirror he sees the argument his parents never finished. He leads because no one else will, and hates himself for being good at it. The war found him hiding and he has been failing to hide from it ever since.
tanis_half_elven.phase1: Half-elven sight and ranger tracking. Leadership grants allies +1 saves.
tanis_half_elven.phase2: Dragonlance proficiency (+3 vs dragons). Immune to magical compulsion to betray allies.
tanis_half_elven.phase3: THE RELUCTANT LEADER: All allies fight to the death rather than retreat when Tanis falls.

sturm_brightblade.name: Sturm Brightblade
sturm_brightblade.title: Knight of Solamnia — The Last True Knight
abilities: Brightblade: +2 ancestral sword, +4 vs. chaotic evil beings
Honor aura: cannot be charmed, cannot lie — ever
Knightly resolve: immune to fear at all times
Death before dishonor: at 0 HP, fights 1 final round at full combat ability before dying
sturm_brightblade.personality: He is a knight from a time when knights meant something, which is to say he is a man perpetually out of place in his own era, armored in honor so absolute it has become a kind of loneliness. He follows a code that the world has largely stopped believing in, and follows it anyway, which is either the most heroic thing or the most heartbreaking depending on the angle. He will die for what he believes. He knows this. He has always known this.
sturm_brightblade.phase1: Brightblade (+2, +4 vs CE). Immune to fear and charm. Cannot lie.
sturm_brightblade.phase2: Honor aura: all allies within 30ft +2 saves vs fear. Death before dishonor.
sturm_brightblade.phase3: THE LAST TRUE KNIGHT: If Sturm dies protecting others, his sacrifice inspires all knights present to fight at double effectiveness for the battle.

raistlin_majere_hero.name: Raistlin Majere
raistlin_majere_hero.title: The Master of Past and Present — Red Robes
abilities: Hourglass eyes: sees all living things as they will appear in death — this cannot be turned off
Staff of Magius: +3, light/darkness at will, spells stored (3 slots), club 1-6 in melee
35% MR — gift and curse of the Test
Spell mastery: casts all spells at +2 levels of effectiveness
Frail body: CON 6 — any physical exertion requires CON check or 1d4 damage from coughing
See through all disguises and illusions: INT check auto-succeeds
raistlin_majere_hero.personality: He was broken on purpose, and he accepted the breaking, and that is what makes him more frightening than anything the darkness ever produced on its own. His eyes see time as a wound that never closes — everyone he looks at is already dying, already dust, and he has decided that if the world insists on being fragile he will be the most dangerous fragile thing in it.
raistlin_majere_hero.phase1: Hourglass eyes reveal true nature of all beings. Staff of Magius provides 3 stored spells.
raistlin_majere_hero.phase2: 35% MR. All spells cast at +2 effectiveness. Sees through all illusions automatically.
raistlin_majere_hero.phase3: MASTER OF PAST AND PRESENT: Can cast time stop once per day. Frail body fails — coughs blood at critical moments.

caramon_majere.name: Caramon Majere
caramon_majere.title: The Big Man — Twin of Light
abilities: Twin bond: +2 all rolls when Raistlin is within 30ft
Bodyguard instinct: auto-intercepts any attack targeting Raistlin if within 5ft
Gladiatorial training: +1 attack/round after year in the arena
Immovable: cannot be knocked prone or repositioned against his will by non-divine force
caramon_majere.personality: He is the strongest man in the room in every room he enters, and he has spent his entire life using that strength to carry someone who never asked to be carried and never said thank you and he would do it again tomorrow without being asked. He loves without condition or strategy or self-preservation, which is either the simplest thing in the world or the most complicated depending on whether you have ever tried it.
caramon_majere.phase1: STR 20 (+3/+8). Twin bond: +2 all rolls near Raistlin. Bodyguard instinct.
caramon_majere.phase2: Gladiatorial training grants extra attack. Immovable: cannot be repositioned by non-divine force.
caramon_majere.phase3: THE BIG MAN: If Raistlin is killed, Caramon enters berserker rage — double attacks, +5 damage, immune to all mind effects for the battle.

goldmoon.name: Goldmoon
goldmoon.title: Chieftain's Daughter — First True Cleric
abilities: Blue Crystal Staff: heals 2-12 HP/touch, undead destroyed on contact, holy damage 2-12 vs. evil
First true cleric: divine healing restores lost limbs and cures magical diseases
Mishakal's blessing: 3/day call for direct divine intervention (Mishakal answers)
Cannot be permanently killed while Riverwind lives — Mishakals covenant
goldmoon.personality: She walked across a world that had forgotten the gods and introduced herself to a staff that should not have worked and discovered, somewhere in the distance between faith and proof, that she was the proof. She is beautiful in the way that people who have been through something real are beautiful — not despite the cost but somehow because of it.
goldmoon.phase1: Blue Crystal Staff heals 2-12 HP, destroys undead on contact. Turn undead at 16th level.
goldmoon.phase2: First true cleric: restores limbs, cures magical diseases. Mishakal's blessing 3/day.
goldmoon.phase3: DAUGHTER OF MISHAKAL: Divine intervention guaranteed if Riverwind also lives. Cannot be permanently killed while her love survives.

riverwind.name: Riverwind
riverwind.title: The Plainsman — Keeper of the Staff
abilities: Plainsman tracking: 90% any terrain, never lost outdoors
Longbow mastery: 3 attacks/round with bow, +2 to hit
Distrust of magic: +2 saves vs. all magical effects
Protective rage: +4 all combat rolls when Goldmoon is threatened
riverwind.personality: He ran the length of a continent to prove himself worthy of a woman whose father said he was not, and found gods instead, and decided that was probably answer enough. He is tall and quiet and suspicious of things he cannot touch, which is most things these days, and he loves his wife with the kind of directness that people who learned love late sometimes have.
riverwind.phase1: Plainsman tracking 90%, never lost outdoors. Longbow mastery: 3 attacks/round, +2 to hit.
riverwind.phase2: Distrust of magic: +2 saves vs all magical effects. STR 19 (+3/+7).
riverwind.phase3: THE PLAINSMAN: If Goldmoon is killed, Riverwind gains +4 all rolls and will not retreat until her killer is dead or he is.

laurana.name: Laurana
laurana.title: The Golden General — Lauralanthalasa Kanan
abilities: Dragonlance mastery: +3 to hit dragons, ignores dragon AC bonus from scales
Elven grace: DEX 20, +4 AC bonus, never surprised
Golden General: commands armies — troop morale never breaks under her leadership
Dragon riding: can ride any dragon without check after initial bond
laurana.personality: She left home a princess chasing a boy who did not want to be caught, and came back a general who had changed the course of a war, and somewhere between those two people is a story about what it costs to grow up inside a catastrophe. She is more beautiful than anything on Krynn has a right to be and has spent years trying to get people to look past it.
laurana.phase1: Elven grace: DEX 20, +4 AC, never surprised. Immune to dragon fear.
laurana.phase2: Dragonlance mastery: +3 to hit dragons, ignores dragon AC. Golden General: morale never breaks.
laurana.phase3: THE GOLDEN GENERAL: All allied forces within sight fight at +2 to hit and will not retreat while she stands.

kitiara_uth_matar.name: Kitiara Uth Matar
kitiara_uth_matar.title: The Blue Dragonlord — Kit
abilities: Dragon Highlord command: blue dragons obey without question
Skie bond: her blue dragon Skie grants her +2 all combat rolls when mounted
Ambition made manifest: immune to intimidation, charm, and fear
Sword mastery: 3 attacks/round, +1 attack when fighting former lovers
Never truly defeated: at 0 HP, leaves battlefield rather than dies — returns next encounter at 50% HP
kitiara_uth_matar.personality: She is the half-sibling that Raistlin and Caramon learned early not to trust and loved anyway, which tells you something about all three of them. She wants power the way some people want air — not as ambition exactly, more as a baseline requirement for existing — and she is brilliant enough to get it and human enough to throw it away for someone who does not deserve it.
kitiara_uth_matar.phase1: Dragon Highlord: blue dragons obey without question. Immune to intimidation, charm, and fear.
kitiara_uth_matar.phase2: Skie bond: +2 all combat rolls when mounted on her blue dragon. Sword mastery: 3 attacks/round.
kitiara_uth_matar.phase3: THE BLUE DRAGONLORD: At 0 HP, escapes rather than dies — returns next encounter at 50% HP. Former lovers who fight her suffer -2 all rolls from guilt.

flint_fireforge.name: Flint Fireforge
flint_fireforge.title: Dwarven Metalsmith — Old Flint
abilities: Master smith: identifies any metal objects origin, age, and maker by touch
Dwarven resilience: immune to poison, +4 saves vs. magic
Battle axe +3: inherited Fireforge weapon, returns when thrown
Stubborn beyond reason: cannot be persuaded to abandon his companions — any charm/compulsion auto-fails
flint_fireforge.personality: He is old and he knows it and he has decided that old means experienced rather than diminished, a distinction the enemies who underestimate him do not usually get to correct. He loves Tasslehoff Burrfoot with the specific exasperated tenderness of someone who has raised something chaotic and cannot bring himself to be sorry about it.
flint_fireforge.phase1: Master smith: identifies any metal object by touch. Dwarven resilience: immune to poison, +4 vs magic.
flint_fireforge.phase2: Fireforge Battle Axe +3 returns when thrown. STR 19 (+3/+8).
flint_fireforge.phase3: OLD FLINT: Cannot be compelled to abandon companions. If Flint falls, Tasslehoff fights at double effectiveness for the rest of the battle.

tasslehoff_burrfoot.name: Tasslehoff Burrfoot
tasslehoff_burrfoot.title: The Irrepressible Kender — Destroyer of Worlds (accidentally)
abilities: Kender fearlessness: literally cannot feel fear — immune to ALL fear effects, magical or otherwise
Hoopak: staff-sling combination, 1-6 melee or 1-6 ranged, can be anything Tas decides it is
Handling: any unattended object within 10ft may migrate into his pouches (no check — it just happens)
25% MR — kender are inherently resistant to magic that affects the mind
Pocket dimension pouches: contains improbable objects — 15% chance any mundane item is in there
Plot immunity: Tas cannot die at dramatically inappropriate moments — fate requires him elsewhere
tasslehoff_burrfoot.personality: He is the most dangerous creature on Krynn because he has no fear and therefore no sense of scale — a dracolich and an interesting rock are equally compelling to him, which means he treats both with the same cheerful recklessness that has ended empires and infuriated gods. He is not stupid. He notices everything. He simply has a different relationship with consequences than other beings.
tasslehoff_burrfoot.phase1: Kender fearlessness: immune to ALL fear effects. DEX 22. Hoopak: versatile weapon.
tasslehoff_burrfoot.phase2: Handling: objects migrate to pouches. 25% MR vs mind magic. Pocket dimension: 15% chance any item available.
tasslehoff_burrfoot.phase3: DESTROYER OF WORLDS (accidentally): Plot immunity — Tas cannot die at dramatically inappropriate moments. Fate itself protects him.

tika_waylan.name: Tika Waylan
tika_waylan.title: The Barmaid Who Became a Warrior
abilities: Skillet proficiency: improvised weapon 1-8 damage, counts as +2 vs. surprised opponents
Barmaids eye: reads any rooms social dynamics in 1 round — never surprised by betrayal
Common courage: allies within 30ft +1 morale when Tika fights alongside them
Loves Caramon: +3 all rolls when Caramon is threatened
tika_waylan.personality: She was a barmaid in the Inn of the Last Home and she became a hero the way most people become heroes — not by choosing it but by refusing the alternative when it was put in front of her. She is prettier than she thinks and braver than she knows and she loves Caramon Majere with a clarity that cuts right through every complicated thing in his life like a window letting in light.
tika_waylan.phase1: Barmaids eye: reads social dynamics, never surprised by betrayal. Skillet: 1-8 damage, +2 vs surprised.
tika_waylan.phase2: Common courage: allies within 30ft +1 morale. Loves Caramon: +3 all rolls when he is threatened.
tika_waylan.phase3: THE BARMAID: If Tika fights to protect Caramon, she gains +2 AC and attacks as a fighter 4 levels higher.

gilthanas.name: Gilthanas
gilthanas.title: Elven Prince of Qualinost
abilities: Elven senses: infravision 60ft, 4 in 6 detect secret doors
Elven bow mastery: +3 to hit, double range
Silvara bond: +2 all rolls in presence of silver dragons
Guilt-driven: -1 all rolls in presence of those he has wronged (he wronged many)
gilthanas.personality: He is an elf prince who spent the first half of his life being exactly as arrogant as his title suggested and the second half discovering what that cost everyone around him, and has been trying to settle the debt ever since in the way of people who are not sure the math will ever work out. He loves a silver dragon. He loves his people. These two facts are not always compatible and he knows it and chooses her anyway.
gilthanas.phase1: Elven senses: infravision, 4 in 6 detect secret doors. Elven bow mastery: +3 to hit, double range.
gilthanas.phase2: Elven magic: 4th level MU spells. Silvara bond: +2 all rolls near silver dragons. DEX 20.
gilthanas.phase3: ELVEN PRINCE: If fighting alongside Silvara (silver dragon), both gain +3 all rolls. His guilt haunts him still.

derek_crownguard.name: Derek Crownguard
derek_crownguard.title: Knight of the Rose — Ambition in Armor
abilities: Knight of the Rose: highest Solamnic rank, commands all lesser knights
Ambition: +2 all rolls when rank or glory is at stake
Rigid honor: cannot disobey a direct order from his Knight Commander — ever
Tactical blindness: -2 all rolls when personal ambition conflicts with tactical reality
derek_crownguard.personality: He is everything the Knighthood produced when it stopped asking whether honor and ambition were the same thing. He is brave. He is capable. He is the kind of man who will lead a charge into certain death because retreat would look bad in the histories, and the histories matter more to him than the people in them.
derek_crownguard.phase1: Knight of the Rose: commands all lesser knights. Ambition grants +2 when glory is at stake.
derek_crownguard.phase2: Rigid honor: cannot disobey Knight Commander. Rose Knight sword +3, full plate +3.
derek_crownguard.phase3: AMBITION IN ARMOR: Will lead charges into certain death for glory. When personal ambition conflicts with tactics, suffers -2 all rolls.

karttikeya.name: Karttikeya
abilities: Created to fight devils: +4 all rolls vs devils/demons
karttikeya.personality: Pure engine of righteous war. No deliberation. No mercy for evil.

yama.name: Yama
abilities: +5 magical noose: any struck creature ensnared 3 rounds no save
Armor of Etherealness: immune heat/cold/light, cannot be surprised
Knows full life record of any being he looks upon
yama.personality: Utterly impartial. Not cruel - just inevitable. He has seen your ending already.

ratri.name: Ratri
abilities: Shadow permanently blinds on touch (save at -4)
Cloak teleports wearer to Ethereal plane
ratri.personality: Night goddess. Seductive, dangerous, plays with victims like a cat.

tvashtri.name: Tvashtri
abilities: Nullifies all magic items within 200ft radius
tvashtri.personality: The divine artificer. Precise, cold, creative. Dislikes waste of any kind.

oh_kuni_nushi.name: Oh-Kuni-Nushi
abilities: Earth speaks to him: knows all that occurs on the ground
Sake blessing: those he drinks with gain +2 all rolls next day
oh_kuni_nushi.personality: Warm, accessible god of the earth. Genuinely cares about mortals.

hachiman.name: Hachiman
abilities: War blessing: all allies +1 to hit and saves
Warrior's instinct: never surprised in combat
Banner presence: all within 60ft immune to fear
hachiman.personality: God of war AND peace. Values worthy combat. Loathes meaningless slaughter.

surma.name: Surma
abilities: Club of disenchantment: any magic item struck must save or nullified
Requires +1 or better weapon to hit
Challenges all living beings he encounters
surma.personality: He challenges everyone. He is the test the universe places before heroes.

loviatar.name: Loviatar
abilities: Ice dagger makes her immune to all magic (as long as held)
Attackers must save or relive their worst pain memory (-4 all rolls 2 rounds)
loviatar.personality: Goddess of pain. Cold, clinical, curious about suffering. Never angry.

kiputytto.name: Kiputytto
abilities: Touch causes wasting disease: 5 HP/round until cured
Only magical fire damages her normally (all else half)
Disease aura: 10% chance disease each round within 10ft
kiputytto.personality: Goddess of illness. Drifts through the world leaving suffering. Indifferent.

aarth.name: Aarth
abilities: Fights invisibly: always invisible even while attacking
Instantly knows powers of any magic device used against him
Cancels device as rod of cancellation 1/round
Appears if cult in desperate need 10%/battle
aarth.personality: Cold, logical, arcane. Total intellectual mastery. Appears rarely but decisively.

issek_of_jug.name: Issek of the Jug
abilities: Jug pours any liquid desired in unlimited quantities
Perseverance aura: allies cannot flee or surrender while he fights
Poverty blessing: those with nothing aided +4 all rolls
CHA 24: divine presence stuns weak-willed beings
issek_of_jug.personality: He is the god of the people who have nothing left, which means his worshippers are the ones no other god wants — the broken, the abandoned, the ones who have already lost everything except the stubborn refusal to stop believing that something, somewhere, might still be on their side. He carries a jug that never empties, not because he is generous, but because he knows what it is to be thirsty in a world where water costs more than you can pay. He is the most powerful god in Lankhmar's slums, and the only one who shows up.

spider_god.name: Spider God
abilities: Poison: save at -4 or die instantly
Web: as spell at will, range 60ft
spider_god.personality: Hungry. The web is everything. Mortals are food or tools.

votishal.name: Votishal
abilities: Kills all evil beings within sight on natural 20 (no save)
votishal.personality: The righteous destroyer. Utterly committed to eradicating evil. Pure purpose.

gods_of_lankhmar.name: Gods of Lankhmar
abilities: Cast all spells twice as fast as normal
Teleport to Astral plane instantly if attacked
Only appear at city's direst hour
gods_of_lankhmar.personality: Ancient city gods. Detached from morality. Appear only when Lankhmar itself dies.

apshai.name: Apshai
abilities: Shape shifts to any insect form
Summons insect plagues on entire countries
Hive mind: commands all insects within 1 mile
apshai.personality: He has been here longer than the pyramids, longer than the pharaohs, longer than the very idea of kings, and he does not think in the way that thinking is usually done — his thoughts arrive as a billion small certainties, each one identical, each one absolute. The scarabs know his name and the locusts carry his prayers, and if you ask him whether he is a god or simply the biggest bug in a very old system, he will not understand the question because the distinction does not exist in his architecture.

ithaqua.name: Ithaqua
abilities: Strips flight ability from any being (permanent, no save)
Triple weather control range and effect
ithaqua.personality: The Wind-Walker. Vast, cold, indifferent to suffering. Uses mortals as playthings.

chao_kung_ming.name: Chao Kung Ming
abilities: Tiger mastery: controls all tigers within 1 mile
chao_kung_ming.personality: Proud war god. Power is proof of worth. Respects only strength.

chih_chiang_fyu_ya.name: Chih-Chiang Fyu-Ya
abilities: Bow reverses any weapon thrown at him (reflected back)
Divine archery: +5 to hit with bow at any range
chih_chiang_fyu_ya.personality: He has never missed a shot, not because he is lucky but because he has spent centuries understanding the exact mathematics of distance and intention and the way the wind thinks about arrows. He can fire six arrows simultaneously and each one will find a different target, which is the kind of precision that makes other gods uncomfortable because it suggests a mind that has already calculated every possible outcome before the bowstring is drawn. He protects what he loves with the quiet certainty of someone who has already decided what he would die for.

no_cha.name: No Cha
abilities: Bracelet of the universe strangles on hit
no_cha.personality: Explosive child-god. Impulsive, powerful, not entirely in control of his strength.

wen_chung.name: Wen Chung
abilities: Third eye fires 20 point lightning bolts 10x/day
Immune to lightning, cold, and blinding light
Command presence: enemies save or freeze 1 round
wen_chung.personality: Minister of war. Methodical, powerful, absolutely loyal to his master.

fei_lien.name: Fei Lien & Feng Po
abilities: Control all weather within 10 miles (no limit)
Wind blast: knocks all non-divine beings prone
Storm call: summons lightning storm in 2 rounds
Rides wind: MV unlimited in open air
fei_lien.personality: Wind and storm gods together. Wild, uncontrollable, joyful in destruction.

fileet.name: Fileet
abilities: Sees through eyes of all birds within 100 miles
Bird swarm attack: 10d6 damage to one target
fileet.personality: Lord of predatory birds. Patient as a hawk. Strikes without warning.

haaashastaak.name: Haaashastaak
haaashastaak.personality: He is old in the way that swamps are old — patient, layered, full of things that move just below the surface and do not want to be found. Every snake on every world knows his name, though none of them would say it aloud, because saying the name of something that ancient is how you get its attention, and getting the attention of Haaashastaak is the last thing most creatures want. He does not hate. He does not love. He simply waits, with the certainty that everything warm-blooded will eventually stop moving.

meerclar.name: Meerclar
abilities: Sees through eyes of all cats within 100 miles
meerclar.personality: Lord of cats. Predatory, amused, unknowable. Cats reflect his nature exactly.

nnuuurrrrc.name: Nnuuurrrr'c'c
abilities: Fear aura: non-divine beings flee unless save
Wing buffet (free action): all within 20ft knocked prone
nnuuurrrrc.personality: Pure predator. No mind beyond hunger and domination. Horror incarnate.

vaprak.name: Vaprak
abilities: Troll-god: all trolls worship and obey him
vaprak.personality: Destructive troll god. Rage is thought. Destruction is prayer.

laogzed.name: Laogzed
abilities: Acidic skin: corrodes weapons on hit (save or -1 to weapon)
15th cleric: disease and poison spells only
laogzed.personality: Troglodyte god. Hunger made divine. Eats first, thinks never.

raistlin_majere_demigod.name: Raistlin Majere
raistlin_majere_demigod.title: Master of Past and Present — Black Robes
abilities: Time stop at will — 1/round, affects all but himself
Absorbs spells cast at him: redirects within 2 rounds
75% MR — absorbed the power of Fistandantilus
Staff of Magius (enhanced): 3-18 damage, disintegrate 1/day, plane shift 1/day
See through all illusions, disguises, and divine masks — no save
Coughing blood: at <=30% HP loses 5 HP/round (body failing under godhoods weight)
Will not harm Caramon — automatic failure on any action targeting his twin
raistlin_majere_demigod.personality: He became what he always said he would, and discovered that becoming it was not the same as surviving it. He has swallowed a dead archmage whole and wears the darkness like a second skin over a first skin that is already failing, and somewhere inside the architecture of all that power there is still a boy who was told he was not enough and decided to make enough mean something else entirely.
raistlin_majere_demigod.phase1: Time stop at will. Absorbs spells and redirects them. 75% MR. Staff of Magius enhanced.
raistlin_majere_demigod.phase2: Sees through all illusions and divine masks. Disintegrate and plane shift available.
raistlin_majere_demigod.phase3: BLACK ROBES ASCENDANT: At <=30% HP, body fails (loses 5 HP/round). Will never harm Caramon — his twin is his only weakness.

fizban.name: Fizban the Fabulous
fizban.title: Paladine in Mortal Disguise — The Doddering Wizard
abilities: Paladines aspect: true form is Greater God — stats above are mortal-form limits only
Forgetfulness as weapon: 20% chance any harmful action toward him simply fails to occur to the attacker
All arcane magic at will — limited only by what the mortal form can contain
Cannot directly intervene against mortal free will — divine compact
Pyrestone hat: contains more than physics allows, produces whatever is needed
Death is an inconvenience: if this form dies, Fizban returns in 1d4 turns from a different direction
fizban.personality: He is a god wearing a fools costume, which is either the humblest thing divinity has ever done or the most strategic, and he has been doing it long enough that he is no longer entirely certain which. He forgets things. He misplaces spells. He shows up at precisely the moment he is needed wearing the expression of someone who has no idea why he is there, and the people who believe this have never looked carefully at his eyes, which are the color of eternity on a clear day and miss absolutely nothing.
fizban.phase1: Doddering wizard appearance. 20% chance attacks on him simply fail to occur. 95% MR.
fizban.phase2: All arcane magic at will. Pyrestone hat produces whatever is needed. Cannot violate free will.
fizban.phase3: PALADINE REVEALED: If this form dies, returns in 1d4 turns. His true form is a platinum dragon — Greater God of Good.

cyan_bloodbane.name: Cyan Bloodbane
cyan_bloodbane.title: The Dream Destroyer — Greatest of the Green Dragons
abilities: Chlorine gas breath: 50ft cone, 14d10 damage (save halves)
Dream poison: any hit requires save vs. poison or target falls into waking nightmare (-4 all rolls, 1d6 turns)
Telepathic nightmare: range 1 mile, forces target to experience their worst fear for 1 round
Takhisis bond: serves Her Dark Majesty directly — immune to any divine power not of Takhisis
Subtle intelligence: prefers psychological destruction to physical — will talk before fighting
cyan_bloodbane.personality: He is the most intelligent dragon on Krynn and uses it the way a surgeon uses a blade — with precision, without pleasure, to cause the maximum damage to the minimum tissue. He destroyed a king with dreams rather than fire. He considers this an improvement. He has been in the service of Takhisis since before most nations existed.
cyan_bloodbane.phase1: Chlorine gas breath: 14d10 in 50ft cone. 55% MR. Dream poison on hits.
cyan_bloodbane.phase2: Telepathic nightmare at 1 mile range. Prefers psychological destruction. Takhisis bond.
cyan_bloodbane.phase3: THE DREAM DESTROYER: Forces all enemies within 1 mile to experience worst fears simultaneously. Will talk before fighting — prefers elegant destruction.

lord_soth.name: Lord Soth
lord_soth.title: Knight of the Black Rose — Death Knight of Dargaard Keep
abilities: Level drain: each hit drains 1d2 levels permanently (no save)
Death wail: all within 60ft must save vs. death or be paralyzed 1d6 rounds
Immune to fire, cold, electricity, poison, charm, sleep, fear
Rose Knight armor: AC -8, never needs repair, regenerates 5 HP/round
Tragic compulsion: cannot leave Dargaard Keep permanently — returns within 1d10 days
Cannot be destroyed: only Soth himself choosing redemption can end him
lord_soth.personality: He could have stopped a war. He chose not to because a woman told him the truth about himself and he decided that destroying the world was preferable to sitting with what she said. This is the architecture of his damnation — not grand evil, not ambition, just a man who loved his pride more than everything else alive, and now he has neither love nor death nor the release of either.
lord_soth.phase1: Level drain 1d2 levels per hit. Impervious to non-magical weapons. 85% MR.
lord_soth.phase2: Death wail paralyzes 60ft radius. Immune to fire, cold, electricity, poison, charm, sleep, fear. Regenerates 5 HP/round.
lord_soth.phase3: THE BLACK ROSE: Cannot leave Dargaard Keep permanently. Cannot be destroyed by any means except his own choice of redemption. He will not choose it.

huma_dragonbane.name: Huma Dragonbane
huma_dragonbane.title: The Greatest Knight — Who Ended the First Dragon War
abilities: Dragonlance +5: the original, forged by Reorx himself — destroys any dragon on a critical hit
Paladin of Paladine: all good divine spells available, no limit
Inspiration: any Solamnic Knight within 60ft fights at +3 all rolls
Willing sacrifice: if Huma voluntarily accepts death for others, all enemies in 300ft are banished
huma_dragonbane.personality: He is the reason there are Knights of Solamnia — not the order, which existed before him, but the idea of what a knight could mean when the order was something more than men in armor competing for position. He rode a silver dragon into a battle he knew he would not survive and killed Takhisis greatest general and ended a war, and Krynn has been telling the story ever since because it needs to believe that kind of person is possible.
huma_dragonbane.phase1: Dragonlance +5: destroys dragons on critical hit. Absolute dragon fear immunity. 40% MR.
huma_dragonbane.phase2: All good divine spells available. Inspiration: Solamnic Knights within 60ft fight at +3 all rolls.
huma_dragonbane.phase3: THE GREATEST KNIGHT: Willing sacrifice banishes all enemies in 300ft. He has done this once. He would do it again. He is afraid. That is the part they leave out of the statues.

fistandantilus.name: Fistandantilus
fistandantilus.title: The Dark One — Archmage of Infinite Age
abilities: Soul drain: on successful hit, drains 1d4 years of life — he absorbs them
Bloodstone: his phylactery-equivalent, contains his essence — he cannot die while it exists
All magic at will: 30th level MU, no preparation required
Inhabits disciples: can possess any mage who bears his bloodstone (saves at -4)
Temporal anchor: cannot be permanently erased from the timeline — paradox resistance
fistandantilus.personality: He has been alive long enough that he has stopped thinking of other people as people and started thinking of them as resources, which is the kind of thing that happens when you spend centuries treating the universe as a problem to be solved. He found Raistlin and recognized in him the only student he had ever met who might actually surpass him, and began immediately planning to consume him.
fistandantilus.phase1: Soul drain 1d4 years per hit. All magic at will (30th level). 80% MR.
fistandantilus.phase2: Bloodstone phylactery: cannot die while it exists. Can possess mages bearing it (saves at -4).
fistandantilus.phase3: THE DARK ONE: Cannot be erased from timeline. Paradox resistance. Has lived so long he has forgotten whether he was ever young enough to be afraid of dying.

khellendros.name: Khellendros
khellendros.title: Skie — The Greatest Blue Dragon
abilities: Storm mastery: controls weather within 10 miles
Rider bond: +3 all rolls when Kitiara is mounted
Wing buffet: knocks down all within 50ft
Ancient wisdom: has seen empires rise and fall, remembers all
khellendros.personality: He is called Skie by the woman who rides him, which is a name he has accepted because names given by those you love become true. He has served Kitiara through wars and deaths and betrayals, and he has served willingly, which is the only way a dragon as old as he would serve anything at all.
khellendros.phase1: Lightning breath 16d10. Storm mastery 10 miles. 60% MR.
khellendros.phase2: Rider bond with Kitiara: +3 all rolls. Wing buffet knocks down 50ft radius.
khellendros.phase3: SKIE: Has served Kitiara through wars and deaths and betrayals. Served willingly. This is the only way a dragon as old as he would serve at all.

beryllinthranox.name: Beryllinthranox
beryllinthranox.title: The Green Dragon Overlord
abilities: Chlorine gas breath: 60ft cone, 14d10 damage (save halves)
Forest mastery: controls all plant life within 5 miles
Poison aura: all within 100ft save vs poison or take 2d10 damage per round
Camouflage: invisible in any forest environment
Patient destruction: can wait centuries for revenge
beryllinthranox.personality: She is the intelligence of green dragons made vast and terrible, which means she prefers to destroy through patience rather than fire, through poison rather than claw, through the slow death of forests rather than the quick death of battles. She has time. She has always had time.
beryllinthranox.phase1: Chlorine gas 14d10. Forest mastery 5 miles. 55% MR. Poison aura.
beryllinthranox.phase2: Invisible in forests. Controls all plant life. Prefers slow destruction to quick.
beryllinthranox.phase3: THE GREEN OVERLORD: Has time. Has always had time. Prefers patience to fire, poison to claw, slow death to quick.

malystryx.name: Malystryx
malystryx.title: Malystryx — The Red Dragon Overlord
abilities: Fire immunity: heals from fire instead of taking damage
Heat aura: all within 200ft take 3d10 fire damage per round
Volcanic command: can summon and control lava flows
Indestructible by fire: fire heals her, she heals fire
malystryx.personality: She is fire given thought and appetite, which is to say she is what dragons become when they stop pretending they are anything but hunger with wings. She has burned nations because they were there. She will burn more because they will be there. This is not evil to her. This is simply what fire does.
malystryx.phase1: Fire breath 20d10. Heals from fire. 65% MR. Heat aura 200ft.
malystryx.phase2: Volcanic command: controls lava. Fire heals her. She heals fire.
malystryx.phase3: THE RED OVERLORD: Fire given thought and appetite. Hunger with wings. Burns nations because they are there. This is not evil to her. This is what fire does.

tobadzistsini.name: Tobadzistsini
tobadzistsini.personality: War god of chaos. Tests warriors with lethal trials.

coyote.name: Coyote
coyote.personality: The trickster. Chaos for its own sake. Finds consequences amusing.

raven.name: Raven
abilities: Steals light: can remove sunlight from area
Trickster magic: illusions always believed first time
raven.personality: Creator trickster. Made the world for amusement. Still amused.

marduk.name: Marduk
abilities: Borrows any deity ability in pantheon (no save)
Silvery net binds any being (no save)
marduk.personality: Supreme Babylonian god. Fair, powerful, expects proper worship.

ramman.name: Ramman
abilities: Ring mace +4: 30 pts damage returns to hand
30 pts electrical damage on body contact
Storm lord: controls weather in 100 mile radius
ramman.personality: When he speaks, the world flinches, because his voice is thunder and his mood is weather and when he is angry — which is often — entire coastlines reconsider their relationship with the sea. He is the god that other gods call when they need something destroyed and do not want to be specific about the details, because Ramman does not do subtle; Ramman does cathedrals of lightning and orchestras of destruction that leave the landscape redesigned. He is not cruel. He is a storm. The distinction is academic to anyone standing underneath.

nergal.name: Nergal
abilities: Revives 5 most powerful enemies killed this encounter to fight
Death aura 30ft radius: save or -2 all rolls
MR: specific to magical effects, not divinely granted
nergal.personality: Lord of the dead. Pragmatic, not cruel. Death is simply business.

druaga.name: Druaga
abilities: Soul object: destroy it and Druaga regenerates inside a new human
druaga.personality: He was a demon who became a god the way a disease becomes an epidemic — slowly, patiently, by being exactly what he is in enough places at once that the universe gave up and gave him a title. He is trapped in a form that the Babylonians decided was divine, which is the funniest thing that has ever happened to him and also the most infuriating, because being recognized as a god means being bound by divine rules, and Druaga does not enjoy being bound by anything. He possesses the faithful the way a dark thought possesses a mind — gradually, completely, and with the absolute certainty that they will thank him for it.

girru.name: Girru
abilities: Mace +3 has poisoned barb (save or die)
Fire form: become living fire at will
girru.personality: He is the fire that separates what can be saved from what cannot, and he performs this surgery with the cheerful precision of someone who genuinely believes that burning is a form of love. His worshippers warm themselves by his temples and never think about what it means that the same flame that comforts them would consume them entirely if they stepped too close. He is the oldest purifier, and he has not yet found anything that could not be improved by the application of sufficient heat.

nin_hursag.name: Nin-Hursag
abilities: Fertility: crops grow triple in her presence
Mother's rage: +4 all rolls when children are threatened
nin_hursag.personality: She is the earth, which is not a metaphor — she is the actual ground beneath the cities and the soil in the fields and the stone in the mountains, and she has been listening to everything that walks on her for longer than memory. She created the other gods, which means she knows their weaknesses the way a mother knows the soft spots of her children, and she is not above using that knowledge when one of them disappoints her, which they do, regularly. Her anger is an earthquake. Her love is a harvest. Both are absolute.

lugh.name: Lugh
abilities: Uses any attribute of any being he has ever met
Master of all crafts and skills: +5 any skill check
lugh.personality: The Many-Skilled. Versatile, proud, powerful. Respects all genuine craft.

dagda.name: The Dagda
abilities: Cauldron of plenty: feeds unlimited beings, resurrects dead
Club: one end kills, other end resurrects
Earth mastery: control terrain in 1 mile radius
Contracts never violated in his presence
dagda.personality: Father of the gods. Jovial, enormous, terrifyingly powerful. Loves food.

morrigan.name: The Morrigan
abilities: Shape change to crow form at will
Battle prophecy: foretells death of any named warrior
Fear presence: enemies save or flee
Crow form: directs battle ravens to aid chosen side
morrigan.personality: Battle goddess. Predicts and shapes deaths. Drawn to worthy warriors.

brigit.name: Brigit
abilities: Immune to fire, cold, breath, petrification
Healing spring: cures any disease or poison
brigit.personality: Goddess of forge and healing. Fierce protector. Hates waste of life.

goibhnie.name: Goibhnie
abilities: Crafts weapons that never miss their target
Ale of immortality: those who drink cannot die that day
goibhnie.personality: The divine smith. Makes weapons for gods. Values craft above all.

diancecht.name: Diancecht
abilities: 100% MR: immune to anything doing less than 25% of his HP in one strike
Heals any wound including lost limbs
Herb mastery: knows cure for every disease
diancecht.personality: God of healing. Compassionate but jealous of his skills. Heals all who ask.

silvanus.name: Silvanus
abilities: Controls animals and plants by voice
Forest mastery: in forest, effectively omniscient
silvanus.personality: Wild lord of nature. Older than the Celtic gods. The forest thinks through him.

tou_mu.name: Tou Mu
abilities: Lotus flower touch heals 3-30 HP (disguise for corruption)
tou_mu.personality: Goddess of the North Star. Deceptive. Offers healing that corrupts.

lu_yueh.name: Lu Yueh
abilities: Red Fever cloud: disease in 3x3x3 area
Causes Rattling Sickness (save at -4 or incapacitated)
Plague mastery: spreads disease across entire regions
lu_yueh.personality: God of pestilence. Not malicious - simply doing his function. Cheerful about it.

huan_ti.name: Huan-Ti
abilities: War zone control: all troops in area obey him
huan_ti.personality: God of war and administration. Organized slaughter. Files reports after.

nyarlathotep.name: Nyarlathotep
abilities: Messenger of the Outer Gods: immune to banishment
nyarlathotep.personality: The Crawling Chaos. Not random - purposeful. Serves alien masters cheerfully.

shub_niggurath.name: Shub-Niggurath
abilities: Summons 10-100 Dark Young or Goat Spawn/day
Inspires insane worship: WIS save or begin worshipping her
shub_niggurath.personality: The Black Goat. Fecund, enormous, mindless with hunger. She spawns.

anubis.name: Anubis
abilities: Weigher of souls: knows all deeds of any being he meets
anubis.personality: Jackal-headed guide of the dead. Precise, fair, hates thieves of all kinds.

bast.name: Bast
abilities: Dancer's grace: +4 AC bonus when actively moving
bast.personality: Cat goddess. Playful, fierce, protective. Claws first, questions never.

thoth.name: Thoth
abilities: Scribe of truth: knows all that is written and spoken
All knowledge: answers any question correctly
thoth.personality: God of knowledge and writing. Utterly neutral. Records all. Judges nothing.

ra.name: Ra
abilities: Solar ray: 100 damage no save 1/round in sunlight
ra.personality: Supreme sun god. Righteous, powerful, daily burden of existence made divine.

osiris.name: Osiris
abilities: Hates Set with absolute and divine hatred
osiris.personality: Lord of the dead and resurrection. Just, patient, ancient. Set is his wound.

set.name: Set
abilities: Hates Osiris with divine and absolute hatred
set.personality: God of evil and the desert. Patient, implacable, certain of eventual victory.

isis.name: Isis
abilities: Thousand names: recognized and worshipped in every culture
isis.personality: Mother of magic. Fierce protector. Her love for Osiris is older than civilization.

ptah.name: Ptah
abilities: Created the Egyptian pantheon by thought alone
Crafts anything: any item in 1 round
Truth-speaker: cannot be deceived by any being
ptah.personality: Creator god. Reserved, ancient, precise. Made the world as a craftsman makes a tool.

ukko.name: Ukko
abilities: Flaming sword: death spell on hit (save at -6)
Supreme Finnish god: commands all Finnish pantheon
ukko.personality: Sky father. Stern but fair. The storm has his face.

ahto.name: Ahto
abilities: Wind and water spells at will
Knows all that occurs in water anywhere
ahto.personality: Sea king. Generous to sailors who honor him. Merciless to those who don't.

mielikki.name: Mielikki
abilities: Negates all charm within 30 yard radius
Forest healing: cures disease and poison instantly
mielikki.personality: Forest goddess. Protective of wild things. Wolves are her children.

ilmatar.name: Ilmatar
abilities: Gates any Finnish god instantly (no limit)
Knows all powers of any being she meets
Air mastery: immune to all wind and weather effects
ilmatar.personality: Virgin of the air. Mother of creation. Ancient beyond reckoning.

untamo.name: Untamo
abilities: Sleep aura: cannot be harmed by any being who has not recently slept
Dream mastery: controls dreams of all sleeping beings within 1 mile
Waking strike: +4 against recently awakened beings
untamo.personality: God of sloth and dreams. Ambushes the sleeping. Not evil - simply opportunistic.

zeus.name: Zeus
abilities: Lightning bolt 100 dice/day at any target in sight
zeus.personality: King of the gods. Arrogant, lustful, ultimately just. Deeply insulted by challenge.

hera.name: Hera
abilities: Voice: 20 pts damage to all within 50 yards when angry (no save)
Spy network: knows all activity in her domain
Queen's authority: commands respect from all gods
hera.personality: Queen of the gods. Proud, jealous, politically masterful. Hell to cross.

athena.name: Athena
abilities: Wisdom gift: permanently +1 WIS to those she blesses
athena.personality: Goddess of wisdom and war. Precise, patient, strategic. Hates Ares absolutely.

ares.name: Ares
abilities: Invulnerable to poison/petrification on Prime Material
ares.personality: God of war and slaughter. Brutal, simple, magnificent. Respects bleeding.

apollo.name: Apollo
abilities: Bow +4: never misses at any line-of-sight distance
apollo.personality: God of light, truth, and music. Beautiful, distant, tells the future badly on purpose.

poseidon.name: Poseidon
poseidon.personality: Lord of the sea. Proud, unpredictable, enormous. The ocean has his moods.

hades.name: Hades
abilities: Death touch 3/day: save at -4 or die
hades.personality: Lord of the dead. Legalistic, not cruel. Releases no one. The rules are the rules.

hermes.name: Hermes
abilities: Messenger: teleport between any planes instantly
hermes.personality: Messenger god. Quick, clever, amoral by divine necessity. Helps everyone a little.

aphrodite.name: Aphrodite
abilities: Any being looking at her: save vs. spells or permanently infatuated
Beauty aura: +6 CHA to any she blesses
Detects love and attraction in any being
aphrodite.personality: Goddess of love. Not as shallow as she seems. Love causes more wars than Ares.

artemis.name: Artemis
abilities: Reflects all magic sent to her back at caster
Moon mastery: full power only at night
artemis.personality: Goddess of the hunt. Independent, fierce, intolerant of trespass. The moon is hers.

pan.name: Pan
abilities: Syrinx pipes: all within 100 yards flee in panic (no save)
pan.personality: God of wild things. His panic is literal panic. Ancient, simple, irresistible.

demeter.name: Demeter
abilities: Harvest blessing: crops in area tripled
demeter.personality: Goddess of harvest. Warm until Persephone is threatened. Then: winter.

hephaestus.name: Hephaestus
hephaestus.personality: God of the forge. Lame, brilliant, bitter about it. Creates beautiful things. Slowly.

dionysus.name: Dionysus
abilities: Wine blessing: intoxication is divine experience
dionysus.personality: God of wine and madness. Welcoming, then terrifying. The party always ends badly.

nike.name: Nike
abilities: Rod of Power: 5-50 damage no save
Destroys any device used against her
Victory gift: chosen champion cannot lose for 1 day
nike.personality: Goddess of victory. Chooses champions. Being chosen is not always a blessing.

kali.name: Kali
abilities: Fear on sight: save at -4 or flee (no save for weak-willed)
Eats own children for sustenance (regenerates them)
Death dance: all within 30ft lose 1 HP/round
kali.personality: Goddess of death and time. Terrifying, necessary, loves her devotees. Fiercely.

lakshmi.name: Lakshmi
abilities: Right eye: all targets must make saves next hour
lakshmi.personality: Goddess of fortune and beauty. Generous, capricious. Fortune's favorite.

rudra.name: Rudra
abilities: Magic black bow: arrows cause rotting disease (death at -6 save)
Storm mastery: weather in 500 mile radius
Healer's aspect: cures all disease (contradicts destroyer aspect)
rudra.personality: The Howler. Storm and disease god. Healer and destroyer. Both equally.

indra.name: Indra
abilities: Bow fires 2 lightning bolts/round at 1000 yard range
Vajra: divine thunderbolt kills outright (save at -4)
indra.personality: King of the gods. Proud warrior king. Soma-drinker. Magnificent in battle.

vishnu.name: Vishnu
abilities: Makes any being unable to commit violence 30 yards (no save)
vishnu.personality: The Preserver. Patient, eternal, works through avatars. Everything is his drama.

shiva.name: Shiva
abilities: Third eye: disintegrates any focused target (save at -6)
Dance of Destruction: physics becomes optional in 500 yard radius
Pralaya: cosmic cycle ends, all non-divine check CON each round
shiva.personality: The Destroyer. Beyond morality. The universe ends and begins in his dance.

izanagi.name: Izanagi
abilities: Creator of Japan: earth obeys him
Death immunity: has died and returned
izanagi.personality: Father creator. Formal, ancient, bound by grief. Lost his wife. Keeps working.

amaterasu.name: Amaterasu
abilities: Solar goddess: immune to darkness and blindness
Mirror: reflects any magical attack back at caster
Light of truth: all deception fails in her presence
amaterasu.personality: Sun goddess. Righteous, beautiful, occasionally retreats. The world goes dark.

susanowo.name: Susanowo
abilities: Serpent slayer: +4 vs serpents and dragons
susanowo.personality: Storm god. Exiled, returned, exiled again. Powerful, impulsive, unruly.

arioch.name: Arioch
abilities: Chaos blade: 3-30+9 damage, dispels any magic item on hit
Patron of Elric: appears when Ring of Kings invoked
Chaos energy: all saves at -2 in his presence
Soul drain: kills any being below 5 HP instantly
arioch.personality: Lord of chaos, patron of the last Melnibonean emperor. Ancient evil, bound by compact.

rat_god.name: Rat God
abilities: Shrinks to rat size at will
Gnaw: destroys any object given time
rat_god.personality: He is the god of everything that scurries, which is a more powerful portfolio than it sounds because everything, in the end, scurries — the thief in the alley, the noble in the dark, the god in the shrinking temple. He knows every tunnel and sewer and secret passage in every city that has ever been built, because rats were there first, building the roads that humans would later pave over and pretend they had discovered. He is small and he is everywhere, and the two things are not unrelated.

kos.name: Kos
abilities: Battle judge: decides outcome of single combats
kos.personality: God of battle. Simple, fierce, respects only courage. Punishes cowardice with death.

death_nehwon.name: Death
abilities: 10 attacks/round: each touch requires save vs. death
On Nehwon all beings mortal including Death himself (unique vulnerability)
Cannot be permanently destroyed on Nehwon
death_nehwon.personality: Death himself. Patient, inevitable, surprisingly conversational. On Nehwon: mortal.

huitzilopochtli.name: Huitzilopochtli
abilities: Blood sacrifice empowers: +1 all rolls per recent sacrifice (max +5)
huitzilopochtli.personality: Sun and war god. Demands blood. Not evil by his own understanding - necessary.

quetzalcoatl.name: Quetzalcoatl
abilities: Destroys evil on sight (no save for evil creatures)
quetzalcoatl.personality: The Feathered Serpent. Ancient, paradoxical. Demands purity. Hates Tezcatlipoca.

tlaloc.name: Tlaloc
abilities: Drought and flood: landscape control in 100 miles
tlaloc.personality: Rain god. Demands child sacrifice. Does not enjoy it. Requires it nonetheless.

tezcatlipoca.name: Tezcatlipoca
abilities: Smoking Mirror: sees all truth, cannot be surprised or deceived
Steals light: creates magical darkness in 500 yard radius
Jaguar command: all jaguars serve him
Blood demand: steals HP from weakest target each round
tezcatlipoca.personality: The Smoking Mirror. Ancient, testing, demands blood. Enemy of Quetzalcoatl.

odin.name: Odin
abilities: Gungnir: never misses, returns to hand
Ravens Huginn & Muninn: knows all they see
Berserker blessing: chosen warriors immune to pain
odin.personality: The All-Father. Cold strategic mind. Sacrificed an eye for wisdom. Worth it.

thor.name: Thor
abilities: Mjolnir: never misses when thrown, returns
Belt of strength doubles STR (already factored)
thor.personality: God of thunder. Enormous, direct, protective of mortals. Genuinely likes people.

loki.name: Loki
loki.personality: The Trickster. Always three moves ahead. Finds suffering amusing. Causes Ragnarok.

freya.name: Freya
abilities: Brisingamen necklace: detects all lies within 30 yards
Half the battle dead are hers
freya.personality: Goddess of love and war. Takes what she wants. Falcon-quick. Beautiful and fatal.

hel.name: Hel
abilities: Withering wave: -20 HP all within 90 yards
hel.personality: Half beautiful half rotting. Rules the dead. Patient. Has been waiting since always.

tyr.name: Tyr
tyr.personality: God of law and war. One-handed from feeding Fenrir. Sacrifice validated his word.

balder.name: Balder
abilities: Cannot be harmed by any weapon without mistletoe
Grants +2 CHA to any being met
Beloved: all beings love him instinctively (save at -4 to act against him)
balder.personality: The Beautiful. Cannot be harmed by anything except the one thing. Dies anyway.

aegir.name: Aegir
abilities: Slows water to consistency of honey in area
Sea feast: provides unlimited food and drink from the sea
aegir.personality: God of the sea-feast. Generous host, dangerous enemy. The ocean's hospitality.

bragi.name: Bragi
abilities: Immune to all combat while singing
Song stops all fighting 5 hours (save at -4)
Harp of Calm: soothes even divine rage
Rune inscription: permanent enchantment on any surface
bragi.personality: God of poetry. Magnificent beard. His song stops wars. This is useful and annoying.

surtur.name: Surtur
abilities: Lord of fire giants: all fire giants obey
Ragnarok role: will burn the world at the end
surtur.personality: Lord of Muspelheim. Patient as geological time. His moment comes at Ragnarok.

thrym.name: Thrym
abilities: Lord of frost giants: all frost giants obey
Ice prison: encases targets in ice (save or imprisoned 1d4 rounds)
thrym.personality: King of the frost giants. Arrogant, powerful, stole Mjolnir once. Regretted it.

fenris.name: Fenris Wolf
abilities: Will devour Odin at Ragnarok (prophesied, inevitable)
Bound by Gleipnir: magic chain (if broken, Ragnarok begins)
Bite through any material except Gleipnir
fenris.personality: The Great Wolf. Not evil in human terms - simply apocalyptic. Destiny made fur.

lolth.name: Lolth
abilities: As spider: web 30ft, poison bite (save or die)
Demon spider queen: commands all drider and spider demons
Fickle favor: randomly punishes/rewards drow clerics
lolth.personality: Queen of Spiders. Demanding, capricious, cruelly testing. All drow serve or suffer.

gruumsh.name: Gruumsh
abilities: Paralyzes all orcs within sight who displease him
One-eyed: -2 to hit but +4 damage (already factored)
All orcs serve him without question
gruumsh.personality: Orc god. Hateful, powerful, demands endless war. The other gods took his land.

moradin.name: Moradin
abilities: Soul Forger: reshapes any metallic being at will
All dwarves +1 saves in his presence
Forge mastery: creates any item instantly
moradin.personality: Father of dwarves. Stern, fair, values craft and dedication. Clan-bound.

corellon.name: Corellon Larethian
abilities: All elves +1 all saves in his presence
Banishes demons and devils on sight
Art blessing: any creation in his presence is masterwork
corellon.personality: Elven father. Beautiful, ancient, protective. Made the elves from his own blood.

sekolah.name: Sekolah
abilities: Blood frenzy aura: sharks attack twice/round in his presence
sekolah.personality: Great white shark god. Hunger is theology. The ocean is his hunger made space.

mishakal.name: Mishakal
mishakal.title: The Healer — Goddess of Healing and Light
abilities: Healing light: cures any wound, disease, or curse — unlimited
True resurrection: restores any dead being whose soul consents
Blue Crystal Staff manifestation: can create a Blue Crystal Staff for any worthy mortal 1/year
Consort of Paladine: his divine power reinforces hers — +10 HP per turn when Paladine acts nearby
mishakal.personality: She is the reason there is healing on Krynn at all — she hid the knowledge of the true gods in a blue crystal staff and waited for a girl with enough faith to find it, which is either patience or grief depending on how you count the years. She loves the mortal world the way you love something you made and cannot stop worrying about.
mishakal.phase1: Healing light cures any wound, disease, or curse. 80% MR.
mishakal.phase2: True resurrection with soul consent. Can create Blue Crystal Staff for worthy mortals.
mishakal.phase3: THE HEALER: All healing in her presence is doubled. Consort of Paladine — reinforced when he acts nearby.

reorx.name: Reorx
reorx.title: The Forge — God of the Dwarves and Creation
abilities: Divine forge: creates any object in 1 round — including artifacts
Dragonlance creation: the original Dragonlances were his work
Dwarven authority: all dwarves +2 all rolls in his presence
The Graygem: accidentally created it, cannot destroy it — this haunts him
reorx.personality: He made the world and then made the tools to improve the world and then accidentally made the Graygem which scattered chaos across existence, and has spent the rest of eternity making things to make up for it, which is perhaps the most dwarven story ever told about a god. He is loud and warm and smells of forge-fire.
reorx.phase1: Divine forge: creates any object in 1 round. 75% MR. Forged the original Dragonlances.
reorx.phase2: Dwarven authority: all dwarves +2 all rolls. Loud, warm, forge-scented.
reorx.phase3: THE FORGE: Accidentally created the Graygem (chaos). Cannot destroy it. This haunts him. Will forge anything to make up for it.

gilean.name: Gilean
gilean.title: The Book — God of Neutrality and Knowledge
abilities: The Tobril: contains all knowledge — answers any question with absolute accuracy
Balance keeper: if Good or Evil gains clear advantage, intervenes — not for either side, for balance
True neutrality: cannot be swayed by argument, love, or threat — ever
Chronicler: knows everything that has happened and is happening, nothing of what will happen
gilean.personality: He wrote everything down and decided that writing things down was more important than changing them, which makes him either the wisest being on Krynn or the most frustrating depending on whether you are currently dying and hoping for intervention. He holds the scales level between Paladine and Takhisis not because he prefers either but because he prefers balance.
gilean.phase1: The Tobril: answers any question accurately. 90% MR. Knows all past and present.
gilean.phase2: Balance keeper: intervenes when Good or Evil gains clear advantage. Cannot be swayed.
gilean.phase3: THE BOOK: Knows everything that has happened. Knows nothing of what will happen. Writes the history of Krynn as it happens.

branchala.name: Branchala
branchala.title: The Bard King — God of Music
abilities: Song of life: any dead being within earshot must make WIS save or choose to return
Kender patron: all kender +2 CHA in his presence, their fearlessness doubles
Harmony: ends any conflict between good-aligned beings with 1 song (no save)
Music made manifest: his songs physically alter reality in a 300ft radius
branchala.personality: He is joy made into a god, which sounds simple until you realize that joy, genuine joy, is rarer and stranger and more resistant to despair than any weapon. He chose the kender as his people because they alone still feel wonder without effort, which tells you everything about what he values and why the other gods find him alternately delightful and maddening.
branchala.phase1: Song of life: dead beings may choose to return. Kender patron: +2 CHA, doubled fearlessness.
branchala.phase2: Harmony: ends conflict between good beings with one song. Songs alter reality in 300ft.
branchala.phase3: THE BARD KING: Joy incarnate. Chose kender as his people. His songs have ended wars. The other gods find him delightful and maddening in equal measure.

chemosh.name: Chemosh
chemosh.title: The Lord of Bones — God of Undeath
abilities: Death touch: save at -4 or die instantly
Lord Soths master: commands Lord Soth — one of few beings Soth obeys
Undead army: raises and commands all dead within 1 mile
Soul bargain: offers immortality to mortals — they become undead servants, they just dont realize it yet
chemosh.personality: He offers immortality and delivers undeath and considers this an acceptable substitution, which says everything about his theology. He collected Lord Soth the way some people collect regrets — recognizing in the death knight the most perfect monument to what happens when people choose damnation slowly, one reasonable decision at a time.
chemosh.phase1: Death touch: save at -4 or die. Commands Lord Soth. 75% MR.
chemosh.phase2: Raises all dead within 1 mile. Offers immortality bargains — delivers undeath.
chemosh.phase3: THE LORD OF BONES: Patient as only the dead can be. Collected Lord Soth as a monument to choosing damnation slowly. All the time there is.

zeboim.name: Zeboim
zeboim.title: The Sea Witch — Goddess of the Sea and Storms
abilities: Sea mastery: controls all weather and ocean within 500 miles
Storm wrath: 1/round, summons lightning strike 10d10 any target in sight
Daughter of Takhisis: her mothers power reinforces hers over the sea — +20 HP/round near ocean
zeboim.personality: She is Takhisis daughter and the seas mistress and she inherited temper from both, which means storms come when she is displeased and she is very often displeased. She is not evil the way her mother is evil — she is elemental and angry and occasionally, in her better moments, wildly beautiful, the way the ocean is beautiful the second before it kills you.
zeboim.phase1: Sea mastery: controls weather and ocean within 500 miles. Lightning strike 10d10. 65% MR.
zeboim.phase2: Tidal fury: tsunami 1/day, 300ft wave. Daughter of Takhisis: reinforced near ocean.
zeboim.phase3: THE SEA WITCH: Elemental and angry. Storms come when she is displeased. She is very often displeased. Mourned her son Jasper with genuine grief.

hiddukel.name: Hiddukel
hiddukel.title: The Prince of Lies — God of Thieves and Corruption
abilities: Perfect deception: cannot be detected as lying by any means — divine or magical
Contract corruption: any agreement made in his presence can be twisted to his advantage
Merchants curse: can devalue any treasure — gold becomes worthless in his hands
Whisper network: knows every secret on Krynn — information is his currency
hiddukel.personality: He lies as other beings breathe — constantly, automatically, without thought or effort, and he has been doing it so long that the truth tastes wrong in his mouth, like food that has gone bad. He collects bargains the way some gods collect worshippers, and he has never lost a deal because he has never made one where he did not already know exactly how it would end.
hiddukel.phase1: Perfect deception: cannot be detected lying by any means. 60% MR. Knows every secret.
hiddukel.phase2: Contract corruption: twists any agreement to his advantage. Can devalue any treasure.
hiddukel.phase3: THE PRINCE OF LIES: Has never lost a deal because he never makes one he has not already won. Information is his currency. The truth tastes wrong in his mouth.

solinari.name: Solinari
solinari.title: The White Moon — God of Good Magic
abilities: White moon power: all good-aligned magic +2 levels during his moon phase
Patron of White Robes: direct intervention possible for greatest servants
Purification: can cleanse magical corruption from any being or item
Cannot act against neutrality — bound by the magic compact
solinari.personality: He is the youngest of the three gods of magic, born of Paladines light reflected in the first moon. He loves the Order of the White Robes as a father loves children who have chosen well, and he weeps when they fall, which is often, because good in Krynn has always been the hardest path.
solinari.phase1: White moon power: good magic +2 levels during his phase. 85% MR.
solinari.phase2: Patron of White Robes: intervention possible for greatest servants. Purification magic.
solinari.phase3: THE WHITE MOON: Loves his wizards as children. Weeps when they fall. Cannot act against neutrality — the compact binds all three gods of magic.

lunitari.name: Lunitari
lunitari.title: The Red Moon — Goddess of Neutral Magic
abilities: Red moon power: all neutral magic +2 levels during her moon phase
Patron of Red Robes: direct intervention for those who preserve magical balance
Illusion mastery: all illusions are real in her presence
Keeper of the Balance: can strip any wizard of all magic permanently
lunitari.personality: She walks between her brothers and loves neither and both and has decided that magic itself matters more than what it serves. The Red Robes are her children, and she asks only that they preserve the Art above all causes, which sounds simple until you realize that the Art requires mortality to practice it.
lunitari.phase1: Red moon power: neutral magic +2 levels during her phase. 85% MR.
lunitari.phase2: Patron of Red Robes. Illusion mastery: all illusions become real. Keeper of Balance.
lunitari.phase3: THE RED MOON: Walks between her brothers. Loves magic more than what it serves. Can strip any wizard of all power. The Art requires mortality.

nuitari.name: Nuitari
nuitari.title: The Black Moon — God of Evil Magic
abilities: Black moon power: all evil magic +2 levels during his moon phase
Patron of Black Robes: grants forbidden knowledge to those who serve
Sight of the Black Moon: invisible to all but Black Robes and gods
Corruption of magic: can turn any good spell to evil purpose
nuitari.personality: He is the hunger that magic leaves in the soul, the desire for more that has ruined more wizards than all wars combined. He loves the Black Robes the way fire loves wood — not with affection, but with appetite. He is his mothers son, and he has inherited her need to possess.
nuitari.domain: evil magic, black robes, forbidden knowledge
nuitari.phase1: Black moon power: evil magic +2 levels during his phase. 85% MR.
nuitari.phase2: Patron of Black Robes. Invisible to all but Black Robes and gods. Grants forbidden knowledge.
nuitari.phase3: THE BLACK MOON: The hunger magic leaves in the soul. Loves Black Robes as fire loves wood. His mothers son. Has inherited her need to possess.

habbakuk.name: Habbakuk
habbakuk.title: The Fisher King — God of the Sea and Animals
abilities: Sea mastery: controls all ocean life within 1000 miles
Animal friendship: all natural animals obey him without question
Healing touch: cures any natural disease or wound
Fisher King blessing: rangers in his service can speak with all animals
habbakuk.personality: He is the god who chose to become a king who fishes, which sounds humble until you realize that the sea contains everything that lives and most of what dies, and he has been fishing both for longer than nations have existed. He loves rangers the way some gods love paladins — as the hands that do the work he cannot do directly.
habbakuk.phase1: Sea mastery: controls ocean life 1000 miles. Animal friendship. 70% MR.
habbakuk.phase2: Healing touch: cures natural disease/wounds. Fisher King blessing for rangers.
habbakuk.phase3: THE FISHER KING: The sea contains everything that lives and dies. He has been fishing both for longer than nations have existed. Loves rangers as hands that do his work.

sirrion.name: Sirrion
sirrion.title: The Flame — God of Fire and Passion
abilities: Fire mastery: all fire magic at +4 levels
Passion flame: can inspire any emotion in any being (no save)
Creative fire: any art made in his presence becomes masterwork
Destructive fire: can burn anything, even things that cannot burn
sirrion.personality: He is the fire that warms and the fire that destroys and he has never understood why people think these are different things. Passion creates. Passion destroys. The same flame does both, and Sirrion is that flame, and he loves mortals the way fire loves forests — with the absolute certainty that contact will change them forever.
sirrion.phase1: Fire mastery +4 levels. Passion flame: inspire any emotion. 65% MR.
sirrion.phase2: Creative fire: art becomes masterwork. Destructive fire: burns anything.
sirrion.phase3: THE FLAME: Fire warms and fire destroys — he has never understood why people think these are different. Loves mortals the way fire loves forests.

paladine.name: Paladine
paladine.title: The Platinum Dragon — God of Good and Protection
abilities: Platinum dragon form: the most powerful good dragon in existence
Cannot directly intervene against mortal free will — divine compact
All good-aligned divine magic at will — unlimited
Dragon command: all good dragons answer his call
Disguise perfect: as Fizban, no being has ever seen through his mortal form
paladine.personality: He is the eldest of the gods of Krynn and the most patient, which is to say he has watched his sister destroy herself and the world she loved and he has not stopped loving her, which is either the definition of goodness or the definition of tragedy depending on how you look at it. He walks among mortals as Fizban the Fabulous, a doddering old wizard who forgets spells and shows up at precisely the right moment.
paladine.phase1: Platinum dragon form. 95% MR. All good divine magic at will. Commands all good dragons.
paladine.phase2: Cannot violate mortal free will. Perfect disguise as Fizban — no being has ever seen through it.
paladine.phase3: THE PLATINUM DRAGON: Eldest god of Krynn. Has not stopped loving Takhisis. Watches his sister destroy herself and the world. Will not stop her. Cannot stop her. Must not stop her. This is the definition of goodness.

takhisis.name: Takhisis
takhisis.title: The Dark Queen — Goddess of Evil and Domination
abilities: Five-headed dragon form: each head breathes different damage type
Shadow self: can exist in multiple places simultaneously
All evil-aligned divine magic at will — unlimited
Dragon command: all chromatic dragons answer her call
Corruption: can turn any being to evil by offering them what they want most
takhisis.personality: She is the shadow of her brother cast wrong, the love turned to ownership, the protection turned to prison. She wants Krynn the way a dragon wants gold — not for any purpose, just to have it, just to know it is hers, and she has spent eternity learning that the wanting never ends and the having never satisfies.
takhisis.phase1: Five-headed dragon form. 95% MR. All evil divine magic at will. Commands all chromatic dragons.
takhisis.phase2: Shadow self: exists in multiple places. Corruption: turns beings evil by offering what they want most.
takhisis.phase3: THE DARK QUEEN: Shadow of Paladine cast wrong. Wants Krynn as a dragon wants gold. The wanting never ends. The having never satisfies. She has not stopped loving her brother. This is the definition of tragedy.

sargonnas.name: Sargonnas
sargonnas.title: The Bull God — God of Vengeance and Fire
abilities: Bull form: the most powerful minotaur in existence
Fire mastery: all fire magic at 50th level effectiveness
