Vengeance aura: any being who has wronged him suffers double damage from his attacks
Honor bound: cannot break his word once given — even to enemies
Consort of Takhisis: bound to her, hates her, cannot escape her, cannot stop wanting her
sargonnas.personality: He is Takhisis consort and he hates her with the specific hatred of someone who has been bound to someone he cannot escape and cannot defeat and cannot stop wanting. He is the god of minotaurs and the god of vengeance, which means he serves the Dark Queen while planning her destruction, which is either the most loyal thing or the most treacherous depending on who wins.
sargonnas.phase1: Bull form. Fire mastery at 50th level. 90% MR.
sargonnas.phase2: Vengeance aura: wronged him, suffer double damage. Honor bound: cannot break his word.
sargonnas.phase3: THE BULL GOD: Consort of Takhisis. Hates her. Cannot escape her. Cannot stop wanting her. Serves her while planning her destruction. This is either loyalty or treachery depending on who wins.

jormungandr.name: Jormungandr (Midgard Serpent)
abilities: 25,000 miles long (body is effectively a terrain feature)
Venom kills in 2 rounds (no save reduces to WIS save only)
Regenerates all damage each round except to head
jormungandr.personality: The World Serpent. Not intelligent in human terms. Rage made flesh and scales.

apep.name: Apep
abilities: Eternal enemy of Ra: Ra fights Apep every night
apep.personality: The eternal enemy of order. Wants to swallow the sun. Not symbolic: literal.

cerberus.name: Cerberus
abilities: 3 heads (each has 30 HP; destroy all to kill)
cerberus.personality: The watchdog of Hades. Not evil: dutiful. Three heads, one purpose: no one leaves.

shoggoth.name: Shoggoth
abilities: Immune to weakness, paralysis, and charm
Mimicry: repeats any sound it has heard
shoggoth.personality: Mindless. Created by the Primordial Ones as servants. Rebelled. Not improved by rebellion.

mi_go.name: Mi-Go (Fungi from Yuggoth)
abilities: Immune to cold, dark, and vacuum
Extract and preserve brains in cylinders
Pincers: precise surgical tools or weapons
mi_go.personality: Fungal alien scholars. Highly intelligent. Consider humans interesting specimens.

byakhee.name: Byakhee
abilities: Life drain: -1 STR per hit (returns after rest)
byakhee.personality: Servile horrors. Loyal to Hastur above all. Carry travelers between stars. Badly.

deep_ones.name: Deep Ones
abilities: Immortal: do not die of age
Interbreed with humans (offspring become Deep Ones at 21)
deep_ones.personality: Not mindless. Serve their gods. Pity humans who do not understand their destiny.

primordial_one.name: Primordial One
primordial_one.personality: The original alien masters. Ancient, brilliant, terrified of their own creations.

thunder_bird.name: Thunder Bird
abilities: Lightning bolt 30 damage any target 50-300 yards 1/round
Storm calling: summons thunderstorm in 1 round
thunder_bird.personality: Sacred thunder creature. Ally of the worthy. Destroyer of the wicked. Magnificent.

blodug_hofi.name: Blodug-Hofi (Frey's horse)
abilities: Light beam kills undead within 200 yards
blodug_hofi.personality: She is a horse that is not a horse, or rather she is a horse the way a sunrise is just light — technically accurate but missing the part about how she carries the god of fertility between worlds on hooves made of captured sunlight. She can go anywhere, including places that do not exist yet, and she has seen things in the spaces between worlds that would unmake a mortal mind. She does not speak, because horses do not speak, but if she did she would tell you that the gods ride her, but she decides where they go.

ma_yuan.name: Ma Yuan (Killer of the Gods)
abilities: Stone weapon: doubles the power of enemy weapon against Ma Yuan's attacker
ma_yuan.personality: It is not evil, which is the most terrifying thing about it — it is simply the answer to a question that gods have been asking since the first temple was built, which is "what if something came along that was better at killing than we are?" It has killed more than ten minor deities and wears their symbols the way a hunter wears trophies, not from pride but from the practical understanding that divine symbols make excellent weapons against other gods. It does not hate the divine. It does not love anything. It is a force, like gravity, except gravity has never torn a god apart with its bare hands.

draconians.name: Draconians
draconians.title: The Corrupted Children — Dragon Army Soldiers
abilities: Death throes: Baaz turn to stone, Kapak to acid, Sivak explode 5d6, Aurak explode 10d6
Poison glands (Kapak only): saliva is paralytic poison
Glide: can slow falls and travel short distances
Corrupt origin: +2 saves vs good-aligned magic, -2 vs evil-aligned
draconians.personality: They were made from the eggs of good dragons, corrupted by dark ritual into soldiers for Takhisis armies. They know what they were. They know what they are. Some hate their creators. Some hate themselves. All of them die badly — turning to stone or acid or explosive death, denying their killers even the satisfaction of a clean kill.
draconians.phase1: Death throes vary by type. Glide ability. +2 vs good magic.
draconians.phase2: Flight for Sivak/Aurak. Poison for Kapak. Corrupt origin grants resistance.
draconians.phase3: THE CORRUPTED: Made from good dragon eggs. Know what they were. Know what they are. Die badly — denying killers the satisfaction of a clean kill.

shadow_wights.name: Shadow Wights
shadow_wights.title: The Forgotten Dead — Servants of Chemosh
abilities: Memory drain: victim must save or be forgotten by all who knew them
Shadow form: 75% invisible in darkness, can pass through any opening
Forgetfulness aura: creatures within 30ft forget why they are fighting
Undead immunity: immune to charm, sleep, poison, cold, electricity
shadow_wights.personality: They are what remains when the soul is taken and the memory is left to rot. They exist in the spaces between light, and they feed on the memory of their victims — not the flesh, not the soul, just the knowledge that the victim ever existed. After a shadow wight takes someone, no one remembers they were ever born.
shadow_wights.phase1: Shadow form: 75% invisible in darkness. Passes through any opening. 35% MR.
shadow_wights.phase2: Memory drain: victims are forgotten by all who knew them. Forgetfulness aura.
shadow_wights.phase3: THE FORGOTTEN DEAD: Feed on memory, not flesh or soul. After a shadow wight takes someone, no one remembers they were ever born. This is worse than death.
